templates.name: Size Chart: Women - Clothes
templates.content: You can take a look at our women's size chart here: https://www.darngoodyarn.com/pages/skirt-of-the-month-size-charts

templates.name: Do you have a catalog?
templates.content: I'm really sorry, but unfortunately, we do not have a catalog at this moment.

templates.name: What is the Sari Wrap skirt fabric?
templates.content:
Our Sari Wrap Skirts are a unique blend of enchanting fall colors that are handpicked and handcrafted with love from reclaimed sari materials. These skirts are not only stylish but also sustainable, making them a great choice for eco-conscious fashion lovers. 

What makes these skirts truly special is their versatility - they are entirely reversible, providing you with multiple looks in one. These skirts are made from 100% reclaimed traditional sari material sourced in India and are composed of a silk blend. Plus, they are made from upcycled fabric, making them even more environmentally friendly.

templates.name: How to change my charge date?
templates.content: Login to your account https://www.darngoodyarn.com/account/login?return_url=%2Faccount Click 'Manage Subscriptions' and then 'Edit' on the applicable subscription product. Select 'Next charge date' and a calendar will pop up for you to choose your next charge date. Don't forget to save and check to make sure your charge date updated!

templates.name: How to update my shipping address?
templates.content: Login to your account https://www.darngoodyarn.com/account/login to access your Darn Good Yarn Subscription Dashboard. Click 'Manage Subscriptions' and then 'Edit' on the applicable subscription product. Underneath your subscription will be your address. Click on that box and a new box will pop up. From here, simply update your address!

templates.name: How can I add/remove club exclusive offers?
templates.content: As a Darn Good Yarn Club Member, you have the opportunity to take advantage of exclusive club member only offers. You can add/remove these exclusive offers to your upcoming subscription. Simply follow the instructions on this link: https://www.darngoodyarn.com/blogs/faq/how-can-i-add-remove-club-exclusive-offers

templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content: You can start your return here: https://darngoodyarn.returnlogic.com/

templates.name: Do you ship internationally?
templates.content: Yes, we ship worldwide! You'll see a discounted flat rate shipping rate at checkout.

templates.name: Can I return my subscription box?
templates.content: Due to the amazing discount on these boxes, we do not accept returns or exchanges. If you believe something was wrong, please do not hesitate to contact us directly at info@darngoodyarn.com.

templates.name: Can I use a coupon code on subscription boxes?
templates.content: Yes, unless specifically noted, most coupon codes will work on your first subscription box. Coupons will not apply to subscription renewals.

templates.name: Will my coupon code work on sale items?
templates.content: Unfortunately no, coupon codes will not work on sale, clearance, or promotions. If you have multiple items in your cart, the discount will only be reflected on non-sale items.

templates.name: How do I use/redeem my Karma Points?
templates.content: All you have to do is log into your account here: https://www.darngoodyarn.com/account/login Once you are in your account, scroll down to the Karma Points section and select Redeem for Rewards. From there, select which reward you would like to receive! Don't forget to copy the code given and enter it at checkout in the "gift card and discount code" box and hit apply.

templates.name: Where are your items made / manufactured?
templates.content: Our main production areas are in Bhagalpur, India, and the surrounding villages. It's an area where many people are stuck without work or working jobs that are unhealthy and don't support general well-being. We give these artisans an opportunity to provide for themselves and their families. Please let me know if I can help you with anything else!

templates.name: How many yards in the Mini Witches Brew Crafting Kit?
templates.content: All yarns in the Mini Withes Brew Crafting Kit are Lace weight in 300 yards each.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at info@darngoodyarn.com, live chat with one of our agents via the website or give us a call at 1-518-831-1703. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 1-518-831-1703 or let me know if I can help via text instead.

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here - https://www.darngoodyarn.com/pages/return-policy Keep in mind, some items (such as live sale, static sale & sams sales) are one-of-a-kind items and can't be replaced, returned, or exchanged.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We run free shipping promos at times, and they'll always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: We don't currently have a store but definitely keep an eye out.

templates.name: Rewards
templates.content: We have a rewards/referral program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://www.darngoodyarn.com/pages/loyalty

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content: Happy to help you find the right size! Our clothes generally run true to size. Would you mind sharing your usual size?

templates.name: How to download purchased patterns?
templates.content: To re-download any of your purchased patterns simply log in to your account and look under "Order History." Select the order number that contains the pattern you wish to access. Then click "View Order Status", and on the next screen click "Download Now".

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 2 business days and we usually ship via USPS, UPS, FedEx, DHL, or RR Donnelley. Once shipped, it will take 5-7 business days for domestic orders and 7-10 business days for international orders.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at info@darngoodyarn.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/darngoodyarn/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/DGYarn/

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to apply for wholesale is to go here - https://www.darngoodyarn.com/pages/wholesale-yarn

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://www.darngoodyarn.com/collections/sale

templates.name: How do I pause or cancel my subscription?
templates.content: Log into your account to access your subscription dashboard. Click on 'manage subscriptions', then click 'edit' on the subscription you wish to cancel. Finally, scroll to the bottom of the page and click 'cancel subscription'.

templates.name: Restock? (autosend enabled)
templates.content: I currently don't have the exact date of a possible restock, but I recommend signing up on the product page so you're notified the second it comes back in!

templates.name: How do I wash/care for my skirts?
templates.content: To give your skirts love and life, wash them in cold water using a mesh bag and hang them dry. Avoid wringing too aggressively and use very low heat or place fabric over, as high temps can cause damage.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: We don't handle post-purchase requests via text. Please email your request to  info@darngoodyarn.com, live chat with one of our agents via the website or give us a call at 1-518-831-1703. Please let me know if you have any questions about our products, I'm more than happy to help you here!
